body_preview: - Trajectory Day 134: `state_run_unmatched_non_validation_completed_count=35` — the #1 graph-pressure item. 7 of these are tagged as `state_unmatched/open_after_FailureObserved`. - The dashboard at scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py:2432-2437 already filters recent runs (2-hour cutoff via `_is_recent_run`), so these 35 are genuinely old orphaned runs, not
expected_evidence: Next trajectory shows `state_run_unmatched_non_validation_completed_count` ≈ 28 (35 minus the 7 closed runs). The `open_after_FailureObserved` tag count drops from 7 to 0. Event file has new RunCompleted events with source="harness" and event_type="error" for the affected run_ids. Implementation Notes: Study the existing scan patterns in append_terminal_stat
origin: planner (from trajectory graph pressure + #97 revert evidence)
title: Close open-after-FailureObserved runs in append_terminal_state_events.py
